dataset_name: IBDMDB / iHMP IBD Multi-omics
omics_layer: Multi-omics; Bulk transcriptomics; Metagenomics; Metatranscriptomics; Metabolomics; Metaproteomics; Virome
disease: Crohn disease; ulcerative colitis; non-IBD controls
data_access_status: Public processed data; controlled access for some components
notes: IBDMDB/iHMP/HMP2 longitudinal multi-omics parent row. Count once at cohort level only; do not count modality accessions, portal records, dbGaP, GEO, BioProject/SRA, or IBDMDB portal components as separate cohorts. Public sources describe 132 subjects followed for one year with 2,965 stool, biopsy, and blood specimens and multiple assay layers. GEO GSE111889 is the host transcriptomics component; dbGaP phs001626.v1.p1 and BioProject PRJNA398089 describe the broader IBDMDB/HMP2 resource.

trial_or_study_name: GSE57945; pediatric Crohn ileal transcriptome and microbiome
disease: Pediatric Crohn disease; ulcerative colitis; non-IBD controls
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: RISK pediatric inception-cohort ileal RNA-seq family. GEO sample titles use CCFA_Risk IDs and the JCI publication states samples came from the RISK study. Same broad RISK family as DS040/DS041; public records do not prove exact subject overlap or independence across RISK accessions, so do not sum cohort counts as independent without subject-level reconciliation.

trial_or_study_name: GSE94648; blood biomarkers of mucosal healing and endoscopic response
disease: Ulcerative colitis; Crohn disease; non-IBD controls
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Peripheral-blood biomarker cohort for mucosal healing/endoscopic response; count independently from tissue-biopsy cohorts.

data_access_status: Public processed data
notes: Direct longitudinal IBD single-cell source cohort. No current scIBD/Gut Cell Atlas/HCA component hit found in local coverage; keep independent unless a future integrated resource reuses it.

dataset_name: Martin et al. 2019 Cell / GIMATS anti-TNF resistance
trial_or_study_name: Martin et al. 2019 Cell / GIMATS anti-TNF resistance
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Direct Crohn single-cell source cohort reused by scIBD and Gut Cell Atlas; count the source dataset once, not again through either portal.

dataset_name: HCA Crohn ileal mucosa single-cell project
trial_or_study_name: HCA; treatment-naive and treated Crohn ileal mucosa
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Specific HCA/GEO project-backed Crohn ileal mucosa dataset. Keep as an independent primary source row; do not make it component_of the broad HCA portal row.

dataset_name: ST002470 (UC metabolomics, Metabolomics Workbench)
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data; public portal
notes: PROTECT pediatric UC plasma metabolomics layer paired to DS057/ST002471 stool metabolomics. Public Metabolomics Workbench factors show all 89 DS027 numeric local_sample_id values match DS057 STL-prefixed stool IDs after stripping STL; matching records share collectionWeek and PUCAI_C3_WKall factors. Do not count DS027 as an independent cohort from DS057.

dataset_name: GSE109142 PROTECT pediatric UC rectal RNA-seq
sample_size_subjects: 226 samples in GEO; publication reports 206 UC discovery, 50 UC validation, and 20 controls across deposited PROTECT/RISK context
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Primary PROTECT pediatric UC rectal RNA-seq cohort row. GSE109142 is PROTECT baseline/treatment-naive rectal biopsy RNA-seq from 206 new-onset pediatric UC patients plus controls. Same study family as DS039/GSE150961, but public records do not expose a direct subject-ID crosswalk proving exact sample overlap. Count this as the independent PROTECT cohort row.

dataset_name: GSE150961 PROTECT pediatric UC baseline and follow-up RNA-seq
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Same PROTECT pediatric UC inception cohort family as DS038. GSE150961 is a later PROTECT rectal RNA-seq record focused on colectomy risk and one-year follow-up, with 418 rectal biopsies and baseline/follow-up design. Public GEO/PMC records prove same PROTECT family but do not prove a formal component/subset relationship to DS038 or provide a direct DS038-to-DS039 subject crosswalk. Do not count as an independent cohort from DS038; treat as same-family longitudinal/follow-up PROTECT expression resource.

dataset_name: GSE93624 RISK pediatric Crohn ileal RNA-seq
study_design: Treatment-naive pediatric Crohn inception cohort with follow-up outcome
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: RISK pediatric ileal Crohn RNA-seq row. GSE93624 contains ileal expression at diagnosis from 210 treatment-naive pediatric Crohn disease patients and 35 non-IBD controls from the RISK study, with 3-year complication follow-up. Same RISK family as DS040/GSE117993, but public records do not prove exact subject/sample overlap with the rectal RISK row. External non-row RISK ileal records GSE62207/GSE101794 appear same-family and have reported duplication risk in secondary literature, but they are not current CSV rows.

dataset_name: GSE221161 treatment-naive Crohn FFPE RNA-seq
trial_or_study_name: Pediatric/young Crohn FFPE biopsy RNA-seq biomarker cohort
data_access_status: Public processed data; controlled/planned raw access
notes: Treatment-naive Crohn FFPE RNA-seq biomarker cohort; no current overlap evidence with other registry rows.

dataset_name: GSE112366 UNITI Crohn ileal biopsy expression
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Same UNITI/ustekinumab Crohn family as DS107. Public GEO sample titles share CNTO1275CRD3002 UNITI-2 subject identifiers with DS107; direct matrix check confirms 115 overlapping unique subject IDs. Do not count as fully independent from DS107. Not an exact duplicate because DS047 profiles terminal ileum arrays across week 0/week 8/week 44 plus controls.

dataset_name: GSE92415 PURSUIT golimumab UC mucosal expression
data_access_status: Public processed data
notes: PURSUIT-SC golimumab UC mucosal-expression row. Public GEO metadata show GSE92415 contains 87 baseline UC subjects plus week-6 samples from PURSUIT-SC and 21 healthy controls; direct series-matrix subject-ID review found all 87 GSE92415 UC subject IDs also present in DS060/GSE87466, the adult UC/control subseries of DS060/GSE87473. Do not count DS048 as an independent cohort from DS060. DS048 is not assigned component_of_dataset_id=DS060 because it adds week-6 treatment-response samples, while DS060 also includes a distinct pediatric subseries. No public subject-ID overlap was found with DS083/GSE212849/PROgECT, but absence of controlled crosswalk evidence should remain noted.

dataset_name: GSE206285 UNIFI ustekinumab UC biopsy expression
sample_size_subjects: 568 subjects total: 550 UC patients plus 18 healthy subjects
data_access_status: Public processed data
notes: UNIFI randomized placebo-controlled phase 3 ustekinumab UC baseline sigmoid-colon biopsy expression cohort. Count as an independent cohort; no current evidence of subject overlap with Crohn ustekinumab trial rows such as UNITI/CERTIFI.

dataset_name: PXD030775 deep phenotyping of UC remission states
trial_or_study_name: Deep phenotyping of ulcerative colitis remission states
omics_layer: Proteomics; multi-omics context includes plasma proteins, metabolites, and eicosanoids
sample_size_subjects: Active UC tissue/plasma n=12; additional active UC plasma-only n=4; remission UC n=12; healthy controls n=11
data_access_status: Public PRIDE proteomics; other underlying data shared on reasonable request
notes: Standalone UC remission-state deep phenotyping mass-spec row; no obvious current registry overlap identified in mass-spec family review.

dataset_name: ST002471 PROTECT pediatric UC stool metabolomics
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: PROTECT pediatric UC stool metabolomics layer paired to DS027/ST002470 plasma metabolomics. Public Metabolomics Workbench factors show 89 shared subject/sample IDs with DS027 after stripping the STL prefix, plus two stool-only IDs: 10323 and 10860. Use DS057 as the countable PROTECT metabolomics cohort representative; do not sum DS027 and DS057 as independent cohorts.

dataset_name: GSE87473 moderate-to-severe UC mucosal expression
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Golimumab UC SuperSeries with pediatric GSE87465 and adult GSE87466 components. Direct public series-matrix review found all 87 DS048/GSE92415 PURSUIT-SC baseline UC subject IDs also present in DS060 adult subseries GSE87466, so DS048 should not be summed as an independent cohort from DS060. DS060 remains the broader retained row for this overlapping public subject set; DS083/PROgECT has distinct exposed donor IDs and no public subject-ID overlap with DS060 or DS048.

dataset_name: GSE16879 IBD mucosal infliximab response
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: GSE16879 contains IBD mucosal biopsies sampled before and 4-6 weeks after first infliximab. DS088/GSE73661 contains a 23-patient UC infliximab comparator sampled before and W4-6 after first IFX. Designs and cohort sizes suggest the DS088 IFX comparator may be related to or reprofile a subset of the DS061 UC IFX cohort, but public GEO records use different sample IDs/platforms and no direct subject-ID crosswalk was found. Treat overlap as likely but unconfirmed; do not count the DS061 UC IFX subset and DS088 IFX comparator as independent IFX-response cohorts without manual subject-level confirmation.

dataset_name: GSE12251 ACT1 infliximab UC response
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Component/baseline ACT1 subset of DS106. GSE12251 contains 22 ACT1 patients and 23 pre-infliximab baseline arrays, with patient/timepoint labels matching baseline ACT1 samples in GSE23597; do not count independently from DS106.

dataset_name: GSE14580 UC infliximab response mucosal expression
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Distinct Leuven/KULeuven infliximab UC cohort from the same Gut 2009 publication family as GSE12251. GEO lists 24 active UC patients plus 6 controls with Leuven-style sample labels; no source evidence of subject/sample overlap with ACT1/GSE23597.

dataset_name: GSE52746 Crohn anti-TNF mucosal expression
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Independent anti-TNF Crohn disease mucosal microarray family. No public evidence of sample or subject overlap with DS061-DS063/DS088.

dataset_name: GSE107865 PBMC infliximab response in Crohn
trial_or_study_name: Crohn PBMC expression before infliximab therapy
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: Gaujoux/Gut anti-TNF Crohn blood validation cohort. GEO and the linked paper state 22 Crohn patients had baseline PBMC/whole-blood expression before first infliximab, with W14 response labels. Public sample IDs are HR-* and no public evidence links these subjects to DS061/DS062/DS063/DS064/DS088 mucosal anti-TNF rows. Count as an independent blood validation cohort unless future controlled/source metadata shows reuse.

dataset_name: PXD030121 UC infliximab response proteomics
data_access_status: Public raw and search output files
notes: Zhengzhou UC intestinal-biopsy proteomics cohort. PRIDE and publication describe 12 UC patients: IFX responders, IFX non-responders, severe UC without IFX history, and mild UC without IFX history. The paper uses public GEO transcriptomic cohorts for validation, but public records do not show subject/sample overlap with DS061/DS062/DS063/DS088/DS106. Count as an independent proteomics cohort; note small n and mixed IFX/severity design.

dataset_name: MSV000093975 Crohn diet-intervention stool metaproteomics
trial_or_study_name: Metaproteomics reveals diet-induced changes in gut microbiome function according to Crohn disease location
study_design: Diet intervention with baseline, week 8, and week 36 stool sampling
sample_size_subjects: 62 analyzed participants; source text also describes 70 enrolled participants before exclusions
data_access_status: Public raw data; article/additional files provide supporting processed outputs
notes: Standalone Crohn diet-intervention stool metaproteomics cohort; no obvious current registry overlap identified in mass-spec family review.

dataset_name: GSE212849 PROgECT golimumab UC response microarray
anatomical_site: Colon; 15 to 20 cm from anal verge
study_design: Baseline colon biopsy gene-expression profiling in PROgECT open-label phase 2a golimumab trial
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed data
notes: PROgECT/NCT01988961 golimumab UC screening colon biopsy profiling. Public exposed donor IDs are distinct from DS048/PURSUIT-SC and DS060/GSE87473, with no public subject-ID overlap found; count as independent unless future controlled/source metadata demonstrates shared subjects.

dataset_name: E-MTAB-7845 vedolizumab response mucosal RNA-seq
study_design: Baseline mucosal RNA-seq before vedolizumab therapy; inception and validation cohorts
data_access_status: Public raw FASTQ data; processed data not deposited in BioStudies
notes: Baseline mucosal RNA-seq before vedolizumab therapy; no public evidence of subject overlap with GEMINI/DS088, so count as independent with residual trial-source uncertainty.

dataset_name: GSE152316 BERGAMOT Crohn etrolizumab biopsy RNA-seq
anatomical_site: Ileum; colon; some tissue_site NA in GEO sample titles
study_design: Randomized double-blind placebo-controlled 14-week etrolizumab treatment cohort with screening and week 14 intestinal biopsies
sample_size_subjects: 253 unique patient IDs inferred from GEO sample titles; verify before final use
data_access_status: Public processed data only; raw data not provided
notes: BERGAMOT cohort 1 Crohn disease etrolizumab/placebo RNA-seq trial family. Public GEO evidence shows Crohn disease intestinal biopsies from a phase 3 randomized double-blind placebo-controlled 14-week etrolizumab trial, with 382 samples and Patient### identifiers. Treat as independent from DS105/EUCALYPTUS UC unless future controlled/source metadata shows shared participants.

dataset_name: GSE73661 vedolizumab and infliximab UC mucosal expression
study_design: Phase 3 trial-linked longitudinal treatment-response mucosal expression study with VDZ and IFX comparison
treatment_metadata: Vedolizumab; infliximab; placebo; week 0, week 4-6, week 6, week 12, week 52; responder/non-responder by endoscopic mucosal healing
sample_size_subjects: 44 UC patients in VDZ trials; 23 UC patients in IFX comparison; 12 non-IBD controls
data_access_status: Public raw CEL files; public processed GEO data
notes: DS088/GSE73661 contains a 23-patient UC infliximab comparator sampled before and W4-6 after first IFX in addition to the GEMINI vedolizumab UC material. DS061/GSE16879 contains UC patients sampled before and 4-6 weeks after first IFX. Designs and cohort sizes suggest the DS088 IFX comparator may be related to or reprofile a subset of the DS061 UC IFX cohort, but public GEO records use different sample IDs/platforms and no direct subject-ID crosswalk was found. Treat overlap as likely but unconfirmed; do not count DS088 IFX comparator and the DS061 UC IFX subset as independent IFX-response cohorts without manual subject-level confirmation.

dataset_name: E-MTAB-7604 anti-TNF inflamed intestinal mucosa RNA-seq
disease: Inflammatory bowel disease; Crohn disease and ulcerative colitis noted in study description
specimen_type: Inflamed intestinal mucosal samples; ulcer sampling site
study_design: Anti-TNF responder vs non-responder mucosal RNA-seq comparison
data_access_status: Public raw FASTQ via ENA; public processed count files via ArrayExpress FTP
notes: Prospective Leuven TREM1 anti-TNF mucosal RNA-seq cohort. BioStudies/SDRF list 44 adult IBD ulcer-edge samples, infliximab or adalimumab, colon/ileum, responder/non-responder, with GC*.count sample names and ERR3079558-ERR3079601 runs. Same broad Leuven/TARGID environment as DS061/DS063/DS088, but public metadata show a later RNA-seq cohort with different sample IDs/platform and no direct subject crosswalk. Count as likely independent, with residual uncertainty because public subject IDs are not exposed.

dataset_name: GSE100833 ustekinumab Crohn blood and intestinal biopsy microarray
disease: Crohn disease; inflammatory bowel disease; normal/control samples also appear in GEO sample metadata
anatomical_site: Multiple intestinal regions including ascending colon, terminal ileum, rectum; blood
study_design: Phase 2b multicenter randomized double-blind placebo-controlled ustekinumab Crohn disease study; baseline blood and intestinal biopsy expression profiling
treatment_metadata: Yes; ustekinumab trial context, but public sample-level treatment fields are heterogeneous and need deeper parsing
sample_size_subjects: Unclear overall; GEO design states 87 biopsy patients and 204 blood-sampled patients
data_access_status: Public raw CEL files and processed GEO matrix data
notes: CERTIFI phase 2b ustekinumab Crohn family row. Public GEO evidence supports anti-TNF-refractory Crohn patients in a phase 2b ustekinumab trial with intestinal biopsy and blood microarray samples. Distinct trial family from UNITI/IM-UNITI rows DS047/DS107; no public evidence of subject/sample overlap with UNITI rows. Count as an independent cohort family, but do not interpret DS102 sample count as independent subjects because it includes multiple tissues/timepoints/sample records.

dataset_name: GSE72819 etrolizumab UC baseline biopsy RNA-seq
study_design: Baseline predictor study for week 10 clinical remission after etrolizumab
treatment_metadata: Yes; etrolizumab study, remission at week 10, prior anti-TNF and TNF-IR metadata
sample_size_subjects: 73 patients/samples inferred from one baseline biopsy per GEO sample
data_access_status: Public raw SRA and per-sample processed count/RPKM files
notes: EUCALYPTUS phase II etrolizumab ulcerative colitis baseline biopsy RNA-seq trial family. Public GEO evidence shows baseline colonic biopsies from UC patients enrolled in the phase II EUCALYPTUS study, 73 samples with HF-* sample identifiers, and week-10 remission context. Treat as independent from DS085/BERGAMOT Crohn unless future controlled/source metadata shows shared participants.

dataset_name: GSE23597 infliximab UC colonic biopsy microarray
study_design: Longitudinal treatment-response substudy: placebo or infliximab 5 mg/kg or 10 mg/kg at baseline, week 8, and week 30
treatment_metadata: Yes; infliximab/placebo dose, timepoint, week 8 and week 30 response metadata
data_access_status: Public CEL files and GEO processed data
notes: Primary ACT1 infliximab UC dataset row. GSE23597 contains 48 ACT1 patients and 113 colonic biopsy arrays across baseline, week 8, and week 30; baseline patient/timepoint labels overlap the ACT1 subset represented by GSE12251.

dataset_name: GSE207022 UNITI-2 Crohn rectal biopsy ustekinumab expression
study_design: UNITI-2 phase 3 baseline rectal biopsy expression with week-8 mucosal-healing outcome metadata
longitudinal: No expression time series evident; baseline expression with later outcome metadata
treatment_metadata: Ustekinumab 130 mg IV; ustekinumab 6 mg/kg; placebo IV; week 0 biopsy; week 8 mucosal healing outcome
sample_size_subjects: 148 subjects/samples: 125 moderate-to-severe Crohn disease patients and 23 non-IBD subjects
data_access_status: Public raw CEL files; public processed GEO data
notes: Same UNITI/ustekinumab Crohn family as DS047. Public GEO sample titles share CNTO1275CRD3002 UNITI-2 subject identifiers with DS047; direct matrix check confirms 115 overlapping unique subject IDs. Do not count as fully independent from DS047. Not an exact duplicate because DS107 profiles week-0 rectum biopsy arrays plus controls.

dataset_name: GSE207465 UNITI-2 Crohn whole-blood ustekinumab expression
study_design: Clinical trial expression profiling at week 0, week 6, and week 8 after ustekinumab or placebo induction
data_access_status: Public raw CEL files; public processed GEO data
notes: Same UNITI family as DS047/GSE112366 and DS107/GSE207022. Blood versus tissue and no subject crosswalk checked; do not count independently from UNITI tissue rows until patient IDs are reconciled.

dataset_name: GSE98820 Crohn adalimumab intestinal biopsy expression
trial_or_study_name: Crohn disease intestinal biopsy expression before and after adalimumab treatment
study_design: Before-after adalimumab treatment cohort; biopsies before and after 3 months
data_access_status: Public raw CEL files; public processed GEO data
notes: No current public overlap evidence with existing anti-TNF rows. Count as independent unless future source review links it to another anti-TNF accession.

dataset_name: GSE111761 Crohn anti-TNF LPMC responder expression
study_design: Responder versus non-responder mechanistic anti-TNF cohort during ongoing therapy
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed GEO data
notes: Small mechanistic anti-TNF cohort, not a named trial. Count as independent unless future source review links it to another Erlangen anti-TNF accession.

dataset_name: GSE261334 vedolizumab UC circulating immune scRNA-seq
study_design: Vedolizumab responder/non-responder cohort sampled before treatment and week 6, plus healthy controls
data_access_status: Public processed data; raw files not public due patient privacy
notes: Likely independent vedolizumab UC circulating immune cohort. Count as independent unless future source review identifies overlap with another vedolizumab accession.

dataset_name: GSE228165 vedolizumab UC CITE-seq cell communication
specimen_type: Peripheral blood and colon immune cells
study_design: Vedolizumab response cohort with peripheral blood and colon immune-cell profiling
data_access_status: Public GEO record; raw/processed availability requires source-level confirmation
notes: Likely independent UCSD/Takeda-supported vedolizumab cohort. Manual review should verify exact subject count and whether blood/colon samples are paired before summarizing subjects.

dataset_name: GSE250487 anti-integrin UC colon biopsy scRNA-seq
study_design: Anti-integrin UC single-cell/spatial multi-omics study; colon biopsy scRNA-seq component
sample_size_subjects: 12 study participants in publication/dbGaP inclusion criteria; dbGaP also reports 15 consented subjects; exact GSE250487 subseries-specific subject count not separately exposed
data_access_status: Public processed GEO/Figshare objects; raw sequencing controlled in dbGaP phs003502.v1.p1
notes: Family anchor for GSE250498 anti-integrin UC single-cell/spatial multi-omics. GSE250487, GSE250488, and GSE250490 are subseries from the same participant family; do not sum subseries counts as independent cohorts. Subject counts are not one-to-one with GSM counts because samples were pooled and deconvoluted.

dataset_name: GSE250488 anti-integrin UC blood scRNA-seq
study_design: Matched blood scRNA-seq component of anti-integrin UC study
sample_size_subjects: 11 analyzed PBL scRNA-seq subjects reported in paper figure caption: HC n=4, UC n=3, UC-VDZ n=4; shared study family total reported as 12 participants, with dbGaP also listing 15 consented subjects
data_access_status: Public processed data; controlled raw data
notes: Blood scRNA-seq subseries of GSE250498 anti-integrin UC study. Same participant family as DS114/DS116; paper reports PBL scRNA-seq analysis of 11 subjects. Count as a component, not an independent cohort.

dataset_name: GSE250490 anti-integrin UC colon biopsy CITE-seq
study_design: Colon biopsy CITE-seq component of anti-integrin UC study
sample_size_subjects: 12 study participants in publication/dbGaP inclusion criteria; exact GSE250490 CITE-seq subseries-specific subject count not separately exposed by GEO
data_access_status: Public processed data; controlled raw data
notes: Colon biopsy CITE-seq subseries of GSE250498 anti-integrin UC study. Paper states tissue CITE-seq used colonic biopsies from the same patients; count as a component of DS114, not an independent cohort.

dataset_name: EGAS50000000140 IBD PBMC single-nucleus multiome
trial_or_study_name: Multi-omic characterisation of PBMCs in IBD
omics_layer: Single-nucleus multiome; Single-nucleus transcriptomics; Single-nucleus ATAC-seq
study_design: PBMC stimulation multiome study with RPMI, LPS, and Salmonella conditions
data_access_status: Controlled access
notes: Controlled-access PBMC single-nucleus multiome row. Count as independent unless future overlap with an existing cohort is found.

dataset_name: ST003312/ST003313 Crohn flare serum and fecal metabolomics
trial_or_study_name: Integrative serum and fecal metabolomics before Crohn disease flare
study_design: Longitudinal or flare-prediction multi-specimen metabolomics study
sample_size_subjects: 80 CD patients and 43 controls reported by publication
data_access_status: Public raw data; public processed Metabolomics Workbench data
notes: Combined serum and fecal Crohn flare metabolomics study-family row. ST003312 and ST003313 should be searchable together and counted once; do not create separate independent cohort rows for the serum and feces accessions.
